name: get_availability
description: Check available time slots for a specific user or event type on given dates. Returns a list of available time windows that can be used to create bookings. You must provide the event type ID and a date range. The response accounts for existing bookings, buffer times, and the user's configured availability schedule.

parameters.name: eventTypeId
parameters.description: The ID of the event type to check availability for.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start of the date range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End of the date range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA timezone to express availability in.
